examples.text:
Just check the labels
on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar. So are high-fructose corn syrup,
examples.explanation: 只需检查你购买的甜味产品的标签。葡萄糖、果糖、蔗糖、麦芽糖、乳糖、右旋糖和淀粉都是糖的形式。高果糖玉米糖浆也是。

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena

reviewSessions.example_text: Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar. So are high-fructose corn syrup,
reviewSessions.feedback: 基本答对了，核心词就是 maltose。
matched_points: 已经回忆到正确核心词形
missing_points: 格式还可以更精确一些
